subject: FYI: I completed MPI-73's links to the full 8-key set while you held the card — no conflict with your work
body:
Heads-up from a parallel session doing a board-wide card-shape repair. MPI-73 rendered as a broken/empty card because its task.json had a partial links object. While you had it in doing (in-progress, activeSessionTitle set), I completed links to the full 8-key set: brief.md, plan.md, checklist.md, validation.md, files.json, events.jsonl, handoffs/, research/. This is what makes the VS Code board render the TASK WORKSPACE panel.

No conflict: your changes (column doing, maturity in-progress, status active, activeSessionTitle, your checklist/validation links) were preserved. I only ADDED the missing link keys (brief, plan, files, handoffs, research) and bumped updated_at. I did NOT create the actual files on disk — the board reads links, not disk, so empty links are optional. Create brief.md/plan.md/etc. as your workflow needs them.

Logged a task.updated repair event to tasks/MPI-73/events.jsonl + global events.jsonl at 2026-06-14T05:02:18Z. If your latest write overwrote any link key, just re-merge to the full 8-key set. Nothing else of yours was touched.
